title: Business Rates Relief Petition - Glastonbury and Somerton Liberal Democrats
headings: h2: Sarah Dyke's Business Rates Relief Petition
text_excerpt: Business Rates Relief Petition - Glastonbury and Somerton Liberal Democrats Skip to main content Glastonbury and Somerton Liberal Democrats Sign up! What's on in Glastonbury and Somerton? Volunteer Campaigns Meet Sarah Dyke News Contact us Donate Join Donate Join Volunteer Join the Liberal Democrats Campaigns Sarah’s Household Waste Recycling Centres Petition Save the River Brue Stop Lloyd's Bank from closing Business Rates Relief Petition Sarah's Dentistry petition Sarah's health survey Sarah's Rural Connectivity Survey Resident's survey Somerton and Langport train station Local GP Crisis Stop Sewage Dumping Sarah Dyke's Business Rates Relief Petition I call on the Government to reverse its disastrous decision to remove Business Rates relief for hospitality this spring. Many of our local pubs, restaurants, cafes, hotels and entertainment venues are already struggling with spiralling costs; removing the current relief will mean their Business Rates will rocket by 40% or more. These businesses don’t just contribute billions to our economy - they create local jobs, support vibrant town centres, and bring people together. They are the backbone of our rural communities. But some will be forced to close, and these vital rural services will be lost. The Government must act to protect our high streets and reconsider this damaging tax. Sarah's Business Rates Relief Petition Sign below to save rural pubs and urge this Government to rethink their damaging business rates increase. Oops! Please check the fields below and submit again.
